station.coordinate_source: HELG00DEU RINEX APPROX POSITION XYZ converted on WGS84; loading height follows the published H0=0 m contract

target_grid.fine_override_policy: target cells wholly inside the fine-grid source bounds replace coarse-grid cells

harmonic_detiding.method: ordinary least squares on the registered 30-day model response
harmonic_detiding.scope_warning: The source paper used a three-year ET34-X-V80 analysis. This 30-day fit is a declared reproduction limitation, not an equivalent detiding method.

published_model_target.source: Voigt et al. 2024 section 3.3: mean ratio calculated from the BSH time series over the investigated month

published_observation_context.source: Voigt et al. 2024 section 3.3: observed iGrav047 and HELG extrema at 2022-01-30 05:00 UTC
